story: A cheap, broken locket is all Katrina has left of her parents. After Grace’s death, Katrina opens safe-deposit box 1023 and reads a letter directing her to Mr. Darin Kane for the key to box 1024. Separately, Grace had also given Mr. Kane Katrina’s phone number in case she didn’t come. At the bank, Katrina meets Darin; they talk shyly. He asks her to dinner; she agrees. “Great, I’ll call you,” he says, turning to leave.
implausible_knowledge: Separately, Grace had also given Mr. Kane Katrina’s phone number in case she didn’t come.
question: As Darin turns to leave after saying he’ll call, what will Katrina do?
